# discord_server (Resource)

Manages a Discord server (guild).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the server (2-100 characters).

### Optional

- `afk_channel_id` (String) ID of the AFK voice channel.
- `afk_timeout` (Number) AFK timeout in seconds (60, 300, 900, 1800, 3600).
- `default_message_notifications` (Number) Default message notification level (0 = ALL_MESSAGES, 1 = ONLY_MENTIONS).
- `explicit_content_filter` (Number) Explicit content filter level (0 = DISABLED, 1 = MEMBERS_WITHOUT_ROLES, 2 = ALL_MEMBERS).
- `icon` (String) Base64 encoded icon image for the server.
- `owner_id` (String) ID of the owner of the server. If transferred, this will update.
- `region` (String) Voice region ID for the server.
- `splash` (String) Base64 encoded splash image for the server (VIP only).
- `verification_level` (Number) Verification level required for the server (0-4).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the server.
- `last_updated` (String)
